network_name: Lake Cable LLC — Wire & Cable Manufacturing Supply Network
description: Real-world supply network for Lake Cable LLC (Bensenville, IL). 14-node, 4-tier network centered on copper wire & cable manufacturing. Highlights commodity concentration risk (copper), Gulf Coast polymer exposure, and upstream mine geopolitics.

nodes.name: Lake Copper LLC (Sister Co.)
nodes.notes: In-house copper rod drawing plant. Tightly integrated but single-source — catastrophic if production halts.

nodes.name: Westlake Chemical Corp (PVC Resin)
nodes.notes: Primary PVC resin supplier. Gulf Coast facilities heavily exposed to hurricane season (Jun–Nov).

nodes.name: Southwire Company (Al/Cu Wire)
nodes.notes: Supplemental copper and aluminum wire. Diversifies copper risk beyond Lake Copper.

nodes.name: Belden Inc (Specialty Compounds)
nodes.notes: Specialty cable compounds and insulation materials. Stable but moderate financial health post-restructuring.

nodes.name: Codelco — Atacama Operations
nodes.notes: World's largest copper producer (state-owned). Labor strikes in 2022–2024 caused multi-week outages. Water scarcity risk in Atacama Desert.

nodes.name: Freeport-McMoRan (Peru/Arizona)
nodes.notes: Cerro Verde mine (Peru) faced 45-day community blockade in 2023. Peru political instability adds structural risk.

nodes.name: Shintech Inc (VCM / EDC feedstock)
nodes.notes: Shin-Etsu subsidiary. Produces VCM/EDC feedstock for PVC resin. Freeport, TX plant exposed to Gulf hurricanes — Hurricane Harvey caused 3-week outage in 2017.

nodes.name: Novelis Inc (Aluminum Sheet/Rod)
nodes.notes: Primary aluminum rod/sheet supplier to Southwire. Hindalco subsidiary. Section 232 aluminum tariffs remain an ongoing exposure.

nodes.name: Antofagasta PLC (Copper Ore, Chile)
nodes.notes: Tier-3 copper ore supplier into Codelco smelting chain. Chile's 2022 constitutional referendum and 2023 royalty bill created investment uncertainty.

nodes.name: Southern Copper Corp (Peru Mines)
nodes.notes: Cuajone and Toquepala mines. 54-day community blockade in Feb–Apr 2022 halted operations. High recurring political risk.

nodes.name: OxyChem (Chlor-Alkali / EDC feedstock)
nodes.notes: Chlor-alkali plant feeding ethylene dichloride (EDC) chain into PVC production. Gulf Coast concentration with Shintech.

scenarios.name: LME Copper Price Spike (+40%)
scenarios.description: Copper spot price surges from ~$4.20/lb to $5.90/lb driven by China stimulus and EV demand surge. Lake Copper input costs jump; margin compression begins within 30 days.

scenarios.name: Codelco Chile Labor Strike
scenarios.description: Nationwide Chilean copper mine strike — 2022 pattern repeats. Codelco Atacama operations halted for 3–8 weeks. Copper rod feedstock to Lake Copper constrained.

scenarios.name: Category 4 Gulf Coast Hurricane
scenarios.description: Major hurricane makes landfall near Houston/Freeport TX. Westlake Chemical and Shintech plants flood — PVC resin supply disrupted for 3–6 weeks (Harvey 2017 precedent).

scenarios.name: Lake Copper Plant Fire / Outage
scenarios.description: Production halt at the in-house Lake Copper drawing facility (Bensenville IL). This single-source node supplies ~65% of Lake Cable's copper rod. Even a 2-week outage cascades to finished cable production.

scenarios.name: Peru Mine Blockades
scenarios.description: Community protests block access to Freeport Cerro Verde and Southern Copper mines — 2022–2023 pattern. Multi-week disruption to copper cathode supply hitting Tier-2 feedstock.

scenarios.name: Section 232 Aluminum Tariff Expansion
scenarios.description: Administration reinstates / expands Section 232 aluminum tariffs to 25%. Cost pass-through hits Novelis → Southwire → Lake Cable aluminum wire pricing within 60 days.
